description: Style Notefabindia's jewellery references the eras gone by and are reworked to blend in with your season outfits. Whoever told you ethnic jewellery can't be worn with your fashion favourites were wrong! This statement piece from Fabindia is a jewellery box essential that will make an interesting addition to your simpler ensembles.Product DetailsDrop shape pendant with an opaque mint coloured stone at the baseAntique engraving on the upperA loop for a chain to pass through, chain not includedMaterial and CareSilverWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeLength: 2 cm (approximate)
